itemListElement.reviewBody:
A Heartfelt Thank You to GD Goenka Toddler House!

To be honest, when I first enrolled my daughter at GD Goenka Toddler House, I had my doubts—especially after learning that they don’t introduce pencils until mid-session of pre-nursery. It did make me wonder if this approach was right. But looking back, I can confidently say choosing this school was one of the best decisions we made!

From day one, my little one has flourished—not just in basic academics (I know, it's just the beginning!) but also in extra-curricular activities, confidence, and social skills. The environment here is nurturing, and the faculty truly understands how to shape young minds.

A special thank you to Ms. Samriddhi Jain (Principal) and Ms. Aakshi (Academic Counselor)—they are not just educators but incredible child counselors who help parents understand their kids in ways that would otherwise be challenging. Their expertise, patience, and dedication have been invaluable to our journey.

Some honorable mentions—Ms. Vandana Sharma (my daughter’s absolute favorite!), Ms. Meenu Chaudhary, and Ms. Jyoti—who have not only helped my little one excel but also guided her in channeling her energy in the best way possible.

And of course, a big thank you to the support staff! At a toddler’s house, their role is just as important. The caregivers here are warm, patient, and incredibly attentive, ensuring that every child feels safe, comfortable, and loved. Their efforts often go unnoticed, but they are truly the backbone of this nurturing environment.

As my daughter moves on to her next academic journey, I know that we will always cherish the beautiful memories and the foundation that GD Goenka Toddler House has given her. This school will forever hold a special place in our hearts!

If you’re looking for a place where your child will be nurtured, understood, and guided with love—look no further! Highly recommended!

I am a proud parent of Japneet Kaur, an LKG student at GD Goenka Toddler House, Zirakpur.
Our experience over the past two years has been truly wonderful.
The school conducts various activities that support physical, mental, and moral development.
I have seen significant positive changes in my child’s confidence and learning abilities.
The teachers and staff are extremely cooperative and dedicated to every child’s success.
Their efforts in fostering sharing, caring, and overall growth are commendable.
The learning environment is nurturing, safe, and engaging for young minds.
I truly appreciate the school’s commitment to holistic education.
Thank you for your dedication and continuous efforts in shaping young futures.

Really appreciate the hard work of as a whole management who take care of the kids so well...perfect place for pre school of kids   ...felt the warmth and hardwork of the teachers..and management..kids are in safe hands away from home...good school for overall development of a child.Teachers and management are very well trained and disciplined

I must say by heart that Choosing GD GOENKA Toddler house is one of the best decesion I have ever made for my kid ,their way of enriching child by nurturing them with our Indian Culture and etiquette are just wordless .
The first credit goes to Director mam of this school who has her complete dedication towards making GD Goenka Zirakpur as one of the best school for little loved ones and rest credit to the hounrable teachers who kept our kids like there own in the classes .

I request to mam to upgrade the classes to atleast 5Th class so that I can continue my kid in same school.

Regards
Vivek
वैदिक Father

I am extremely satisfied with GD Goenka Toddler House located in Zirakpur. Their curriculum is well-planned and the teachers and staff are exceptional in taking care of the children. I highly recommend this school to all parents looking for a quality pre-school education.

I'm so glad we chose GD Goenka Toddler House in Zirakpur for my daughter. It has been an amazing experience for both of us. I can see how much she has grown and developed over time. The teachers are all very supportive and caring. I highly recommend this preschool.
The care provided in G D Goenka is what every parent would wish for. The commitment of teachers and support staff towards children is unmatchable.

GD Goenka school is giving a lot of stress and burden of massive holidays assignment to the toddlers. I'm literally shocked after seeing the holidays assignment. I mean why would they give Holidays to the toddlers if they're only spending their holidays doing assignments. Somebody should do something to lessen the burden on these tiny tots. The one child I'm making doing his holidays assignment is literally crying 😭😭😭😭

I am happy to send my son at GD Goenka Toddler House for his early education. The teachers here are professional and have genuine concern for kids. The thing I liked best is that my son being mild autistic, was rejected from a school earlier, but here at GD Goenka, they believe in equality of all and warmly welcomed us. I am positive that my son will surely learn lot from here.
What are the timing for prenursery and how many working days ...is sat sunsay off for prenursery toddlers????
